zh.Minster Abbey Churchyard, Minster in She: 英國肯特明斯特 在 謝坡
zh.Minster Abbey, Minster, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特明斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Juliana de Saye於1308年出生在英國肯特比林時，她的父親Geoffrey de Saye27歲，母親Idoine Leybourne28歲。她於1322年3月23日與Roger de Northwode結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1329年2月20日在英國英格蘭肯特明斯特享年21歲，埋葬在英國肯特明斯特 在 謝坡。

zh-hans.Minster Abbey Churchyard, Minster in She: 英国肯特明斯特 在 謝坡
zh-hans.Minster Abbey, Minster, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特明斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Juliana de Saye于1308年出生在英国肯特比林时，她的父亲Geoffrey de Saye27岁，母亲Idoine Leybourne28岁。她于1322年3月23日与Roger de Northwode结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1329年2月20日在英国英格兰肯特明斯特享年21岁，埋葬在英国肯特明斯特 在 謝坡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Saye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Slovenian Saje: nickname for someone with very dark, sooty hair, derived from the root of sajast ‘sooty’, or directly from saja ‘soot’.
West African (Liberia): from the personal name Saye, found among the Mano (Mah) people, denoting a first-born boy.

variants.name: Say
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Sai in Orne or Say in Indre, France, perhaps so called from a Gaulish personal name Saius + the Latin locative suffix -acum (see also French name 3 below).

English: nickname, perhaps for someone who made or sold say, a type of woollen cloth, or for an habitual wearer of clothes made of this material, from Middle English sai(e) ‘say’ (Old French saie, from Latin saga, plural of sagum ‘military cloak’). See also Sayer .

French (southern): topographic name from saix (from Latin saxum) ‘rock’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word, for example, Say in Loire, Saix in Tarn and Vienne, Le Saix in Hautes-Alpes, or Les Saix in Isère.

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliana de Saye was born in 1308, in Birling, Kent, England, her father, Geoffrey de Saye, was 27 and her mother, Idoine Leybourne, was 28. She married Roger de Northwode on 23 March 1322. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 20 February 1329, in Minster, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 21, and was buried in Minster in Sheppey, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juliana de Saye est née en 1308, à Birling, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey de Saye, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Idoine Leybourne, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Roger de Northwode le 23 mars 1322. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 février 1329, à Minster, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 21 ans, et a été enterrée à Minster in Sheppey, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Juliana de Saye 1308 in Birling, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffrey de Saye 27 und ihre Mutter Idoine Leybourne 28. Sie hat am 23. März 1322 Roger de Northwode geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Februar 1329 im Alter von 21 Jahren in Minster, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Minster in Sheppey, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana de Saye è nata il nel 1308 nel Birling, Kent, England, sua padre, Geoffrey de Saye, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Idoine Leybourne, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Roger de Northwode il 23 marzo 1322. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 febbraio 1329, nel Minster, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 21 anni, e fu sepolta a Minster in Sheppey, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Juliana de Sayeが1308年にイギリスケントバーリングで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Sayeは27歳，母Idoine Leybourneは28歳であった。1322年3月23日にRoger de Northwodeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1329年2月20日にイギリスイギリスケントミンスターで21歳で死去し，イギリスケントミンスター イン シェッピーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliana de Saye(이)가 1308년 영국 켄트 비를링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey de Saye(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Idoine Leybourne(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1322년 3월 23일 Roger de Northwode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1329년 2월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 민스터에서 21세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 민스터 인 셰프피에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana de Saye nasceu em 1308, em Birling, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Geoffrey de Saye, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Idoine Leybourne, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger de Northwode em 23 de março de 1322. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1329, em Minster, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 21 anos, e foi sepultada em Minster in Sheppey, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juliana de Saye родилась в 1308 г. в местности бирлинг, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Geoffrey de Saye было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Idoine Leybourne, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Northwode 23 марта 1322 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 20 февраля 1329 г. в местности минстир, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 21 год и была похоронена в местности минстир ин шеппи, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Juliana de Saye nació en 1308, en Birling, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Geoffrey de Saye, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Idoine Leybourne, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Roger de Northwode el 23 de marzo de 1322. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de febrero de 1329, en Minster, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 21 años, y fue sepultada en Minster in Sheppey, Kent, Inglaterra.
